0.details:
From the moment I met you, I knew you were someone special. You loved me from who I was, you showered me with lot of love and made everything seen possible. I love you (kiss).
As we stand here today, I promise to love you unconditionally, to support your dreams. I vow to laugh, cry and build a life together that is filled with love and joy and adventure.
0.model_generation:
From the moment I met you, I knew you were someone special. You loved me for who I was, you showered me with kindness and made every dream seem within reach. I love you. Your laugh, your gentle strength, and your unwavering faith in us have become the foundation of my world.

As we stand here today, I promise to love you unconditionally, to be your partner in all things. I vow to support your dreams, to celebrate your successes, and to lift you up when times are hard. I will laugh with you in moments of joy, cry with you in moments of sorrow, and stand by your side through twist and turn life brings.

I promise to build a life together filled with love, joy, and boundless adventure, to treasure each day we share, and to grow with you forever. My vow to you, now and always, forever.
0.final_version:

1.details:
I was very hurt finding out about your friend  passing away. My heart gous out to you and loved ones during this incredibly difficult time.
She was a remarcable person who touched the lives  of everyone.Please know that you and your family are in my thoughts and prayerd, May your souls rest easy and my you find peace where you are.
If there is anything I can do to help or support please to not hersitate to reach out.
with deepest sympathy, {Your friend}
1.model_generation:
To my dear friend,

I was deeply saddened to learn of the passing of your friend. My heart goes out to you and all who loved her during this difficult time. She was a remarkable person whose warmth, kindness, and generosity touched the lives of all who knew her. I will always remember her smile and the genuine care she showed to those around her.

Her legacy lives on in the stories we share and the impact she made on our hearts. Though words offer little solace, I hope the love and memories you hold bring you peace. Please know that you and your family are in my thoughts and prayers. May her soul rest in peace, and may you find comfort and strength in your shared memories.

If there is anything I can do to support you—whether a listening ear or a helping hand—please do not hesitate to reach out.

With deepest sympathy,
Your friend
1.final_version:

With deepest sympathy,
Your friennd

2.details:
Dear Mother,
I' m deeply sorry for talking back at you while you were correcting me for the mistake I made, I know my actions hurted you, and for that I am truly sorry. You mean the world to me and I am greatfull and feel terrible fo cousing you pain.
I realized that I did not think about how my actions would affect you, and for that I am trully sorry. You deserve better from me, I promise to do better in future.
I love you and hope you can forgive me and talk to me.
2.model_generation:
Dear Mother,

I am writing to apologize for the way I spoke to you when you were correcting me. I let my frustration get the best of me, and in doing so I disrespected you and caused you pain. I realize now how hurtful my words were, and I deeply regret my behavior.

You have always guided me with love and patience, and I took that for granted. I understand that you only wanted what was best for me, and I should have shown gratitude instead of anger. I promise to be more thoughtful and respectful when we talk, and to listen carefully even when I feel challenged.

Thank you for your unwavering support, guidance, and endless kindness. I value your love more than anything, and I hope you can forgive me and we can talk. I love you very much and look forward to making things right.

Sincerely,

Your loving child
2.final_version:
Dear Mother,

I am writing to apologize for the way I spoke to you when you were correcting me. I let my frustration get the best of me, and in doing so I disrespected you and caused you pain. I realize now how hurtful my words were, and I deeply regret my behavior.

You have always guided me with love and patience, and I took that for granted. I understand that you only wanted what was best for me, and I should have shown gratitude instead of anger. I promise to be more thoughtful and respectful when we talk, and to listen carefully even when I feel challenged.

Thank you for your unwavering support, guidance, and endless kindness. I value your love more than anything, and I hope you can forgive me and we can talk. I love you very much and look forward to making things right.

Sincerely,

Your loving child

3.details:
Dear Friend,
I would like to take this moment to expresss my heartfelt thanks for buying my daughters school uniform and paying her fees. Your kindness and thoughtfullness means the world to me,I' m so greatefull you're in my life.
It brought a big smile to daugther's face. Your support and care for us means everything.
Thank you once againt.
3.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I want to express my heartfelt thanks for purchasing my daughter’s school uniform and covering her fees. Your generosity has relieved a significant burden, and we are deeply touched by your thoughtfulness.

When she tried on her new uniform, her face lit up with pure joy. She’s eager to attend classes, confident and proud. Your support has not only provided her with essential supplies but also boosted her self-esteem and motivation.

Your kindness resonates beyond this moment. It reinforces my belief in the power of caring friends like you. Because of you, our family can focus on her studies and future opportunities without worry. Your generosity inspires us to support others in need and share compassion with our community.

We will always remember this meaningful gift and keep you in our thoughts. We cherish your friendship and the warmth you bring into our lives. Thank you once again for your compassion and unwavering support.

Warmest regards,
3.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I want to express my heartfelt thanks for purchasing my daughter’s school uniform and covering her fees. Your generosity has relieved a significant burden, and we are deeply touched by your thoughtfulness.

When she tried on her new uniform, her face lit up with pure joy. She’s eager to attend classes, confident and proud. Your support has not only provided her with essential supplies but also boosted her self-esteem and motivation.

Your kindness resonates beyond this moment. It reinforces my belief in the power of caring friends like you. Because of you, our family can focus on her studies and future opportunities without worry. Your generosity inspires us to support others in need and share compassion with our community.

We will always remember this meaningful gift and keep you in our thoughts. We cherish your friendship and the warmth you bring into our lives. Thank you once again for your compassion and unwavering support.

Warmest regards,

4.details:
Dear Friend,
It's hard to believe it's been a long time since we cash up. Life has a way of getting busy, but you've been on my mind lately.
I've been thinking about the good old days we spent together, and all the amazing memories we shared. Remember the time we went to the neighbours' girls and we got court you did not know what to say and just mumbling, those were the best times of my life, and I cherish them deeply.
Let's make a plan and cash up again I really mic you.
Warmly
Your FRIEND
4.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I can’t believe how long it’s been since we last caught up. Life has a way of racing past us, but you’ve been on my mind lately. I’ve been reminiscing about the good old days and all the incredible memories we made together. I still laugh thinking about that afternoon at the neighbors’ house when we tried to chat up those girls and ended up getting caught. You were so tongue-tied, just mumbling through an apology—one of my favorite stories to tell. Those moments remind me how much fun we had and how deeply I cherish our friendship. I would love to hear all about your latest adventures and what’s new in your life. Let’s make a plan to reconnect soon—maybe grab coffee or go for a hike and share what’s been happening in our lives. I miss your laughter and our endless conversations. Hope we can catch up before too long.

Warmly,
Your Friend
4.final_version:
Dear Friend.

it's been hard a long time since we last cash up, Life is very busy.
I have been thinking about you lately and the good old amazing memories, I really miss those moments we spent together. Remember when we went to the neighbour's girls and we got court, and you did not know what to say we ran. I hope it's high time we reconnect again.

I would like us to make up a plan and we meet and catch up on those days to even more. I really miss you brother let us do this once Alot has happened since we last spoke, and I would love to hear about what's new with you! How have you been? What's been keeping you busy? 

Let's make a plan even if it's on the phone.
Take care of yourself, I look forward to hear from you soon, love you Brother.

Warmly
Friend

5.details:
Happy birthday to an incredible Mother! Today, we gather to celebrate the life of someone who brings so much light, love, joy to the family. Mother you're more than just a family -you're a source of strength, a pillar of support, and a constant source of love.
We are very lucy to have a mother like you, we love and appreciate, Happy birthday may the Lord grant you with many more year to come and grant what you desire the most.
5.model_generation: Good evening, everyone. Today we celebrate an extraordinary woman whose boundless love transforms our lives each day. Mother, your unwavering strength has guided us through storms and illuminated our brightest moments. Your laughter fills our home with warmth, your wisdom steadies our hearts, and your compassion reminds us what truly matters. You’ve taught us kindness by example, resilience through your actions, and generosity by giving us your whole heart without reservation. We are so lucky to call you ours. As we honor you today, we thank you for every sacrifice made, every encouraging word spoken, and every hug that heals. May this birthday bring you as much joy as you have given us all these years. May the Lord bless you with countless more celebrations, good health, and the fulfillment of your deepest dreams. We love you more than words can say. Happy birthday, Mother.
5.final_version:
Happy birthday to an incredible Mother! Today we gathered here to celebrate the life of someone who brings so much light, love, joy to the family. Mother you're more than just family you're a source of strength, a pillar of support, and a constant source of love.

We are very lucy to have a mother like you a mother who is a friend and everything, we share countless memories with you, from birth to grownups. Your kindness, generosity, and unwavering support inspires us every day. You're the glue that holds our family together, and we're all so gratefull for you.

As you celebrate another year of life, I hope you know how much you're appreciated and loved. here's to another year of laughter, adventure, and making more unforgettable memories together. Cheers to you, May all your birthday wishes come true. May God grant your heart desire.

post_survey.loe: Didn’t Finish High School, but completed a technical/vocational program
